text:
Eye of God (lit. , rom. Goddo Ai) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows the caster to maintain the effect of "List" and "Analysis" on all the restricted slot cards from #001 to #099.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This spell allows the caster to maintain the effect of "List" and "Analysis" on all the restricted slot cards minus "Ruler's Blessing", until the caster leaves the game.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1036 :: 
使用したプレイヤーはＮｏ．００１から０９９までの全てのカードについて、「解析」と「名簿」の効果をいつでも得ることができる。（使用したプレイヤーがゲーム外に出るまで効果は継続する。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1036 :: Eye of God 
Are able to see an active player's No.001 to No.099 cards with the effects of “Analysis” and “List” at any time. (Continues until the active player leaves the game.)
|}

Trivia

In Chapter 134, Shalnark listed this card as one of the two the Phantom Troupe had to prioritize.
In Chapter 154 of the Viz translation, when Killua laments not possessing this card, he refers to it as "God's Eye".
